user_persona: Detection Engineer at a mid-sized commercial bank

user_jobs.name: Triage Alerts
user_jobs.description: Quickly assess and prioritize incoming security alerts

user_jobs.name: Investigate Threats
user_jobs.description: Deep-dive into suspicious activity to determine impact

user_jobs.name: Tune Detections
user_jobs.description: Optimize rules to reduce false positives

user_jobs.name: Collaborate on IR
user_jobs.description: Work with incident response team during active threats

user_jobs.name: Report Findings
user_jobs.description: Document and communicate security incidents to stakeholders

user_jobs.name: Stay Current
user_jobs.description: Keep up with emerging threats and attack techniques
